body.p: MarkLogic already comes with a wide variety of views and tools out-of-the-box.
A production application server should not provide developer tools, and it should be prevented that any half-finished things run in production.
Therefore, it is not surprising that certain views are missing in MarkLogic, such as a data browser Tools for MarkLogicData Browser with syntax highlighting.
This is where diligent developers step in and provide tools.
